appraisal_events.evidence: « devenue la grise prisonnière, réduite à son terne elle-même… elle avait peu à peu perdu sa beauté »; « possédée et sans grande valeur »; elle paraît « triste et las… comme en prison ».
appraisal_events.explanation: The narrator asserts that Albertine's captivity in his home has caused her to lose her 'colors', her beauty, and even her value, except in brief surges where he imagines her free. This presentation locally diminishes Albertine.

status_effects.explanation: In this passage, Albertine is described as 'gray', 'dull', 'without great value' under the effect of her 'servitude', which clearly diminishes her in the eyes of the narrator.
